author: RichiiiTV
name: Podracing II Backoff7gram (1xH100 zlib-fallback sign-of-life)
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission: compact #753-style legal score-first adaptive 2..7-gram backoff root lane, run with flash-attn present but zstandard unavailable, so export used the int6+zlib fallback instead of the intended int6+zstd path. The dense model only reached 899 steps in 600s on one GPU, but the final legal 7-gram exact metric still reached 0.92092798 with a 7,772,644-byte artifact. Off-spec for leaderboard use due to 1 GPU and ~970s n-gram eval.
